title: Calesiam aspleniifolium
taxonomy: Calesiam aspleniifolium is classified within the family Celastraceae. This plant belongs to the genus Calesiam. uses: Calesiam aspleniifolium, also known as False Lady Fern, is used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in treating various ailments.
